title: rosa × centifolia f. cristata
intro: Rosa × centifolia f. cristata, also known as the English or rose de Mai, is a fragrant and ornamental flowering plant, characterized by its unique double-petaled flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa × centifolia f. cristata lie in its ability to calm the mind and body, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety, insomnia, and stress relief. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps. Rosa × centifolia f. cristata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and promote a restful night's sleep.
